prose: **Ethylene Frontier-Orbital Analysis** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fitted) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `.xyz` file (`ethylene.xyz`); single-point calculation (geometry not relaxed). SCF converged in 6 cycles. **HOMO–LUMO gap = 7.4357165 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy). HOMO energy = −7.6155818 eV; LUMO energy = −0.17986527 eV. Additional Koopmans properties: vertical ionization potential = 7.6155818 eV, vertical electron affinity = 0.17986527 eV, electronegativity = 3.8977235 eV, chemical hardness = 3.7178583 eV, electrophilicity index = 2.0431452 eV. All integrity checks passed.
